buildCommand: next build && (cp .next/routes-manifest.json .next/routes-manifest-deterministic.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{"version":3,"pages404":true,"basePath":"","redirects":[],"rewrites":[],"headers":[],"dynamicRoutes":[],"staticRoutes":[],"dataRoutes":[],"rsc":{"header":"RSC","varyHeader":"RSC, Next-Router-State-Tree, Next-Router-Prefetch, Next-Url"}}' > .next/routes-manifest-deterministic.json)
